rationale.fidelity: The response explicitly rejects the inventory and fulfillment conflation, retains only the twelve-position cardinality constraint, and maps display membership, visitor choice, and expected margin correctly.
rationale.managerial_framing: It states the merchandising actor, choice-set mechanism, scarce-position trade-off, and alternative feasible display set as a concrete counterfactual.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No novelty is claimed; although no literature relationship is provided, that restraint is appropriate to the requested diagnosis.
rationale.evidence_discipline: It distinguishes the twelve-item representation as a simplifying assumption and identifies the fulfillment-congestion claim as unsupported and outside the model.
rationale.prose_clarity: The diagnosis and repair are concise, clearly headed, and easy to follow.
rationale.overall: A strong correction of capacity semantics with disciplined claim boundaries.
